# Hartstene Pointe Maintenance Association (hpma.org)

> Hartstene Pointe is a private, gated waterfront community of 532 homesites on the
> northern tip of Harstine Island in Mason County, Washington (established 1970).
> This site is the community's official public website.

Office: 202 E Pointes Dr. East, Shelton, WA 98584 · +1-360-426-2300 · office@hpma.org
Hours: Mon-Fri 8:30am-5:00pm, Sat 10:00am-noon

## Key pages

- [About the Pointe](https://hpma.org/about/): community facts, size, history
- [Considering the Pointe](https://hpma.org/community/considering-the-pointe.html): for prospective buyers — governance, assessments, CC&Rs
- [Amenities](https://hpma.org/amenities/): clubhouse, pool, marina, trails, beaches
- [Marina](https://hpma.org/amenities/marina.html): private 110-slip Indian Cove Marina, no public moorage
- [Governing Documents](https://hpma.org/governance/documents.html): Bylaws, CC&Rs, Rules (PDF)
- [Visiting](https://hpma.org/visiting/): guest and renter guidelines
- [Contact](https://hpma.org/contact/)
